violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
Several air curtains throughout walk-in cooler entrances were osberved in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers in a walk-in have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
